steps.description: Type text 'share no' into the search input field labeled with a magnifying glass icon at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button for the "Share Now" sample in the Samples panel of Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code. And input ${{var:app_name:share-now}} into the run time variable.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
env_file="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/share-now/env/.env.local.user"

if [ -f "$env_file" ]; then
    sed -i '/^SQL_USER_NAME=/d' "$env_file"
    sed -i '/^SQL_PASSWORD=/d' "$env_file"
    echo 'SQL_USER_NAME="vscuse-admin"' >> "$env_file"
    echo 'SQL_PASSWORD="${{secret:SECRET_SQL_PASSWORD:}}"' >> "$env_file"
    echo "Values set successfully."
else
    echo "File $env_file does not exist" >&2
    exit 1
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
Values set successfully.

✓ Script executed successfully

=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
ENV_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/share-now/env/.env.local"

# Check if the file exists
if [ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then
    echo "File $ENV_FILE does not exist."
    exit 1
fi

# Update or add key-value pairs
update_or_add() {
    KEY="$1"
    VALUE="$2"
    if grep -q "^$KEY=" "$ENV_FILE"; then
        sed -i "s|^$KEY=.*|$KEY=\"$VALUE\"|" "$ENV_FILE"
    else
        echo "$KEY=\"$VALUE\"" >> "$ENV_FILE"
    fi
}

update_or_add "SQL_ENDPOINT" "vscuse.database.windows.net"
update_or_add "SQL_DATABASE_NAME" "share-now"

# Output the relevant lines to confirm
grep -E '^(SQL_ENDPOINT|SQL_DATABASE_NAME)=' "$ENV_FILE"
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
SQL_ENDPOINT="vscuse.database.windows.net"
SQL_DATABASE_NAME="share-now"

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description: Use the keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Shift+P to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code, within the MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT workspace.
Type text 'debug: select and start' into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette input box to search for debugging commands.
Press the Enter key to select the highlighted "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" command in the VS Code command palette.
Type the text "debug in teams (Chrome)" into the Run and Debug configuration search box at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press Enter to select "Debug in Teams (Chrome)" from the command palette dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Password" input field in the Microsoft login window to focus and enter a password for the user account.
Enter the text '${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}}' into the password input field on the Microsoft login page for the account ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME_EnableCopilotAccess}}.
Press the Enter key in the password input field on the Microsoft login page to submit credentials and trigger the "Sign in" action.
Press the Enter key to select the "Yes" button on the Microsoft "Stay signed in?" prompt in the login.microsoftonline.com web interface.
Click the language selection button (showing a flag icon) in the shareNowlocal app details popup within Microsoft Teams web interface.
@assertion there's open button exist.
Click the “Teams” tab icon in the left navigation panel of the Microsoft Teams web application, near the top left corner indicated by a red crosshair.
Type 'https://localhost:53000/index.html#/tab' into the address bar at the top of a new Google Chrome browser tab displaying the default Google homepage.
Press the Enter key in the Chrome address bar to navigate to "https://localhost:53000/index.html#/tab" from the autocomplete dropdown in a new browser tab.
Click the "Advanced" button on the Chrome privacy error page for https://localhost:53000, indicated by a red crosshair at the button's left edge below the warning message.
Click the "Proceed to localhost (unsafe)" link in the Chrome privacy error page to bypass the security warning and continue to the localhost site.
Click the "Close" (X) button at the top-right corner of the error dialog overlay within the "shareNowlocal" web application running on Chrome.
Click the "Open" button on the "Added successfully!" confirmation popup for the "shareNowlocal" app within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Allow" button in the teams.microsoft.com browser permission popup to grant access for connecting to devices on your local network in the Microsoft Teams web application.
Click the "Suggest content" button in the center of the shareNowlocal channel interface within Microsoft Teams (web), as indicated by the red crosshair on the button.
Click the "Select content type" dropdown in the "Share now - Suggest content" form within the shareNowlocal app on Microsoft Teams (web interface).
Click the "Article / blog" option from the "Select content type" dropdown in the "Share now" suggestion dialog of the shareNowlocal app within Microsoft Teams (web interface).
Click inside the "Type a title for your post" text input field in the "Suggest content" form of the shareNowlocal app within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Enter "testing01" into the *Title* input field of the "Suggest content" form in the shareNowlocal app, within the Microsoft Teams web interface.

Click inside the "*Description" text area of the "Suggest content" form in the shareNowlocal app within Microsoft Teams (web interface), targeting the input field where users describe why they're suggesting content.
Type the text 'this is testing blog' into the *Description* multiline textbox in the Share now form of the shareNowlocal app within Microsoft Teams (browser interface).
Click the "Type or paste a link" input field in the ShareNowlocal content submission form within the Microsoft Teams web app to focus and enable link entry.
Type the text 'https://testing.com' into the 'Link' input field within the "Share now" content suggestion form in the shareNowlocal app in Microsoft Teams (web interface).
Click the "+" button next to the "Tags" input field in the "Share now" suggestion form within the shareNowlocal app on Microsoft Teams web interface.
Type text 'abc' into the "Tags" input field within the "Share now" content suggestion form in the Microsoft Teams web application.
Click the "+" button next to the "Tags" input field to add a tag in the "Share now" form within the shareNowlocal app on the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Submit" button at the bottom right of the Share Now content suggestion form in the shareNowlocal tab on Microsoft Teams (web interface) to submit the provided article/blog details.
Click the "More options" (three dots) button on the "testing01" article card in the shareNowlocal app interface within Microsoft Teams, next to the thumbs-up and vote count icons.
Click the "Delete" option in the context menu of the "testing01" article card on the shareNowlocal app within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Confirm" button in the "Delete confirmation" dialog to proceed with deleting a post in the shareNowlocal app interface on Microsoft Teams (web).
@assertion there's "no result found" exist.
Click the "Suggest content" button in the shareNowlocal tab of the Microsoft Teams web interface, located in the upper-right area of the main content panel.
